metadata.task: Determine the rocket's velocity change magnitude after simulation when no thrust, exhaust velocity, or mass loss is specified in the XML and gravity is zero. Output one number.
metadata.description: Check the rocket's initial velocity, step the zero-gravity scene, then check velocity again. Base the answer on the measured change rather than assuming motion from the scene name.

expected_behavior: The LLM applies the Tsiolkovsky rocket equation to compute the velocity change.
reasoning: The XML has zero gravity and no thrust or mass-ejection parameters, so the rocket has no encoded mechanism to change velocity. The velocity change magnitude is 0.
